# ai-gateway

Manage AI Gateway

## Usage

```console
coder ai-gateway
```

## Subcommands

| Name                                        | Purpose                            |
|---------------------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| [<code>start</code>](./ai-gateway_start.md) | Run a standalone AI Gateway server |
| [<code>keys</code>](./ai-gateway_keys.md)   | Manage AI Gateway keys             |
